mote-sound-terminal.title: Mote Sound Terminal
mote-sound-terminal.goal: Change track and tempo, switch the scope, pause and resume playback, then reset.
required_checks: Start restores row zero and the initial state

orbital-courier.title: Orbital Courier
orbital-courier.goal: Collect the parcel and reach the depot before forty valid moves expire.

scrapframe-garage.title: Scrapframe Garage
scrapframe-garage.goal: Repair three machines by selecting and installing the correct part for each job.
required_checks: wrong parts return to the same job for retry

radio-ghost.title: Radio Ghost
radio-ghost.goal: Tune and lock three hidden signals before dawn while maintaining enough gain.
required_checks: wide gate expands tolerance but spends gain
good locks advance all three clues
model lock tones reach the cartridge audio
success and dawn endings can restart

harpoon-moon.title: Harpoon Moon
harpoon-moon.goal: Tag three small creatures and defeat the final leviathan before oxygen expires.

controls.a: hold to charge and release to fire

required_checks: three creature tags reveal the boss

turncoat-tactics.title: Turncoat Tactics
turncoat-tactics.goal: Weaken and recruit an enemy, use the new ally, and eliminate the remaining force before the commander falls.

pocket-kaiju-observatory.title: Pocket Kaiju Observatory
pocket-kaiju-observatory.goal: Photograph all three behaviors at safe distances before disturbance or sunset ends the expedition.
required_checks: zoom exposes both valid distance bands
all three timed behaviors add evidence
complete and failure results can restart

rotate-dungeon.title: Rotate Dungeon
rotate-dungeon.goal: Rotate each room, collect its key, and reach the exit through five rooms.

one-last-lap.title: One Last Lap
one-last-lap.goal: Complete three laps while managing lanes, speed and battery; optionally tow the stranded rival.

controls.start: hold to tow in the lap-two rescue zone

required_checks: skipping tow reaches a distinct solo ending

bug-witch.title: Bug Witch
bug-witch.goal: Place logic familiars and solve five circuits with the required output, mix and budget.
